question: [File: 'File Name: rest/controllers/accountController.js -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: getNftsByAccountId()] Can an unprivileged external user send repeated GET /accounts/:idOrAliasOrEvmAddress/nfts requests with the maximum allowed `limit` value to force the server to execute the most expensive multi-union SQL query on every call, causing sustained DB CPU exhaustion that degrades response times for all other users?
